arts.ttl: Excellent display, special day for Manchester United loanee and strongest squad yet - Cheltenham Town boss Michael Flynn after Newport County AFC win
arts.sum: The cross for the first goal from Ethan Williams, how good was that for Matty Taylor's finish? I am really enjoying doing a job for Cheltenham Town Football Club.
